task_description: Implement 14-day exam cooldown, distinct qualified/not-qualified emails with 7-day follow-up for failed candidates, and session-based admin route protection for admin panel, question bank, and dashboard.

verification.summary: All 35 tests pass (27 original + 8 new). New tests cover: admin auth protection for dashboard/candidates/questions, login-then-access flow, logout session clearing, and 14-day cooldown blocking. Tests use separate TestClient instances to isolate session state.
